allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; vers=json.load\(sys.stdin\); compatible=[v for v in vers if v.startswith\('17.'\)]; print\('expo-location 17.x versions:', compatible[-5:]\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; vers=json.load\(sys.stdin\); stable=[v for v in vers if not 'canary' in v and not 'alpha' in v and not 'beta' in v]; print\('all stable:', stable[-20:]\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; vers=json.load\(sys.stdin\); stable=[v for v in vers if not 'canary' in v and not 'alpha' in v and not 'beta' in v]; print\('versions around 17.x:', [v for v in stable if v.startswith\('16.'\) or v.startswith\('17.'\) or v.startswith\('18.'\) or v.startswith\('19.'\)]\)")

Bash(node -e "const v=JSON.parse\(require\('child_process'\).execSync\('npm view expo-constants versions --json'\).toString\(\)\); const sdk52=v.filter\(x=>x.startsWith\('17.'\)\); console.log\('17.x versions:', sdk52.join\(', '\)\)")
Bash(node -e "const p=require\('./package.json'\); console.log\('react-native:', p.dependencies['react-native']\); console.log\('react-native version:', p.dependencies['react-native']\);")
